g.text: Upload errors are logged and retried later.
Upload logic must not interfere with WAL receiver.
Uploads WALs into WAL archive paths in storage.
On success -> delete local uploaded WAL file
Manual backups may also be triggered via HTTP API.
Basebackup failures must not stop WAL receiver.
Stores basebackups under backup paths in the same storage.
deletes WALs older than anchor start WAL.
